description: Strict source-counter budget for the current manual high_bot_soak_degradation policy. Unlike default_soak_budget.json, this lane requires current source-counter completeness and current CPU/source-derived metrics, so it is intended for fresh modern logs rather than legacy pre-counter fixtures.

pass.description: Strict high-bot invariant: the smoke harness must pass.

duration_sec.description: Strict high-bot invariant: expected ten-minute soak with startup/shutdown timing slack.

bot_count.description: Strict high-bot invariant: this budget is scoped to the eight-bot soak.

source_counter_pass_int.description: Strict source-counter invariant: every expected source-counter group must be present.

source_counter_groups_present_count.description: Strict source-counter invariant: all currently known source-counter groups should be represented.

source_counter_groups_missing_count.description: Strict source-counter invariant: no known source-counter group may be absent.

commands_per_bot_sec.description: Strict high-bot invariant: detects severe command starvation or runaway duplicate command submission.

route_commands_per_bot_sec.description: Strict high-bot invariant: route-steered command throughput should track overall command throughput.

route_queries_per_bot_sec.description: Strict pressure budget: route-query rate from the 2026-06-28 source-counter baseline plus slack.

route_refresh_ratio.description: Strict pressure budget: route refreshes should stay within the 2026-06-28 source-counter baseline plus slack.

route_reuse_ratio.description: Strict pressure budget: route cache reuse should remain a meaningful share of route requests.

debug_work_units_per_bot_sec.description: Strict pressure budget: debug overlay work proxy while route and goal debug are enabled.

recovery_command_uses_per_bot_sec.description: Strict pressure budget: recovery command churn budget with headroom over the source-counter baseline.

progress_reports.description: Strict high-bot invariant: ten-minute soak should report roughly once per minute.

bot_frame_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Strict source-counter CPU budget: bot frame CPU must be present and within the source-counter baseline plus real repeated-soak scheduler and combat-state headroom.

route_query_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Strict source-counter CPU budget: WORR route-query CPU must be present and within budget.

route_reuse_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Strict source-counter CPU budget: route-reuse timing must be present and within budget.

q3a_route_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Strict source-counter CPU budget: Q3A route CPU must be present and within budget.

q3a_memory_failures.description: Strict source-counter memory budget: BotLib memory accounting must not report allocation failures.

visibility_decompress_failures.description: Strict source-counter visibility budget: visibility decompression must not fail.

entity_trace_failures.description: Strict source-counter trace budget: entity trace accounting must not report failures.

expected_min_commands.description: Strict high-bot invariant: the final status should still identify the eight-bot target.

commands.description: Strict high-bot invariant: raw final status command count should show sustained bot command throughput.

route_commands.description: Strict high-bot invariant: raw final status route command count should show sustained route steering.

route_failures.description: Strict high-bot invariant: no route failures are acceptable for this baseline smoke.

route_invalid_slots.description: Strict high-bot invariant: no invalid route slots should be observed.

route_debug_missing_frames.description: Strict high-bot invariant: route debug output should keep pace with route command frames.

skipped_inactive.description: Strict high-bot invariant: all eight bots should stay active through the soak.
